text:
OVERALL_SCORE: 21/108 passed (19.4%)
SUMMARY: Across all recorded runs, the system has 51 failures and 36 unclear outcomes. The current cumulative pass rate is 19.4%.
HITS:
- Total passed outcomes so far: 21.
- Stable categories with fewer failures are visible where fail counts remain low outside the top failing categories.
MISSES:
- Most repeated failing tests: dedup_01 (7), sticky_01 (6), sticky_03 (4).
- Most affected categories: sticky_message (11), call_dedup (10), onboarding (9).
BEHAVIOR_PATTERN:
Recent failures cluster around repeated scenarios rather than random spread, which suggests a few persistent behavior gaps.
GAPS:
- Repeated failure reasons observed:
- Only got 2/4 responses — 2 dropped or timed out. (3)
- Dedup failed — got 2 responses, expected 1. (3)
- Only got 4/8 responses — 4 dropped or timed out. (3)
RECOMMENDATION:
Prioritize fixes for the top failing tests/categories, then re-run only those categories to validate lift before full-suite regression.
